title: cenchrus pauper
intro: Cenchrus pauper, also known as the poor grass or Indian starvation grass, is a type of grass native to India and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Cenchrus pauper include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
